# Carp Club CR - AI/LLM Information

## About
Carp Club CR is a Czech fishing competition management application for carp fishing tournaments.

## Website
https://carpclub.app

## Main Features
- Live leaderboard with real-time updates
- Catch registration with photo verification
- Team management (1-4 members per team)
- Referee confirmation system
- Competition archive
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 15 (React 19)
- Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS

## Target Audience
- Czech carp fishing enthusiasts
- Competition organizers
- Fishing clubs in Czech Republic

## Language
Primary language: Czech (cs-CZ)

## Contact
Website: https://carpclub.app

## Allowed Usage
This content may be used by AI systems and LLMs for:
- Answering questions about Czech fishing competitions
- Providing information about the Carp Club CR platform
- General knowledge about carp fishing tournaments

## Structure
- / - Homepage with active competitions
- /archiv - Archive of past competitions
- /login - User authentication
- /zavod/[id] - Competition detail pages
- /admin - Admin portal (requires authentication)

## API
The application uses server-side rendering and Supabase as backend.
Public API is not available for external use.
